article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has made significant inroads in the global music scene through collaborations with notable artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His work is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, reflecting a dynamic approach to electronic music production.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across various projects.
His influence extends to the broader electronic music community, with similar artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
